title: Senior Software Engineer - iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Join the iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates family as a Senior Software Engineer in Vijayawada. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates:
iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates!
